docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COHEN SHARI AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY TIMES COMING UP INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY TIMES COMING UP INCORPORATED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN SHARI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY TIMES COMING UP INCORPORATED $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY TIMES COMING UP INCORPORATED HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-22-1993, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-10-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-05-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN SHARI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY TIMES COMING UP INCORPORATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESP. FROM SHARI COHEN RECEIVED AND SENT TO JUDGE WICK.
MOTION RECONSIDERATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHEN SHARI HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION. OF OCT-26-1993, DENIED
